performanceNotifications.title: Welcome to Selling on Amazon
performanceNotifications.message: Your Individual seller account for Ridgeline Goods is active. Remember that as an Individual plan seller you can list up to 40 items per month without a Professional subscription.

performanceNotifications.title: Ship-by Date Reminder
performanceNotifications.message: One of your merchant-fulfilled orders for SKU TM-CHEAT-GO is approaching its expected ship date. Please confirm shipment to keep your late shipment rate low.

performanceNotifications.title: FBA Inventory Restock Recommendation
performanceNotifications.message: Based on your sales velocity, we recommend restocking TM-KEYCAP-ESC and TM-STICKER-GO within the next 21 days to avoid stockouts.
